input.legal_issue: Can a journalist be compelled to reveal a confidential source in court?
input.story_context: A reporter is being asked by a court to identify a whistleblower source in a story about corporate fraud

input.legal_issue: Is it legal for a landlord to install CCTV cameras in the common areas of a rental building without tenant consent?
Under what circumstances can an EU member state restrict the import of food products from another member state on health grounds?
input.story_context: France has banned the import of a processed meat product from Poland, citing health concerns. Poland says this violates single market rules.
